description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure adorned with a tall, cylindrical headdress and an elaborate, curved element that arches from the top of the head down the back. The figure's arms are positioned with one bent at the elbow and the other hanging straight, and the body is rendered with smooth, stylized contours. The headdress features detailed carvings, possibly representing symbolic or mythological motifs. The back of the sculpture reveals intricate hair or headdress details, and the overall form is slender and elongated. The material appears to be a dark, stone-like substance, giving the sculpture a sense of weight and permanence. The surface is matte with subtle textural variations, suggesting age or weathering.
description: A dark, stone-like sculpture of a standing human figure with a tall headdress and an arched, carved element extending from head to back. The form is slender, stylized, and detailed, with a matte, subtly textured surface.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the figure's face, tall headdress, and the curved element arching from the head, with both arms visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile of the sculpture and the pronounced curvature of the headdress element.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress, detailed hair or headdress texture, and the full length of the arched element.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the slimness of the figure and the vertical alignment of the headdress and arched element.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure with elaborate headdress
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific environment.
